key_items: Bitcoin flashes Kumo breakout with 186% average one-year return - historically bullish technical signal
Morgan Stanley's MSBT completes first month with zero outflows amid Bitcoin ETFs 6-week inflow streak
BlackRock filing for tokenized money market funds to sidestep regulatory yield issues, institutional adoption accelerating
reasoning: Bitcoin shows strong technical bullish signals with Kumo breakout and sustained institutional inflows through major Wall Street vehicles (Morgan Stanley, BlackRock). Regulatory clarity efforts (CLARITY Act progress, stablecoin framework discussions) and institutional infrastructure development create positive macro conditions despite scattered negative headlines about exploits and taxation.
risks: Australia's capital gains tax changes on crypto holdings and potential regulatory friction from banking industry opposition to stablecoin standards could dampen sentiment if they spread to other jurisdictions.
